open.name: Open document
open.desc: Opens a different Leaflys document. For GeoJson documents from other origins, use 'Import' instead.

save.name: Save document
save.desc: Saves this document, preserving all Leaflys-related information for future use inside this app.

import.name: Import GeoJSON
import.desc: Add the contents of a GeoJson file (partially or completely) to this document.

export.name: Export GeoJSON
export.desc: Save this document as a regular GeoJson file, stripping all Leaflys-related fields. If you want to use that file in Leaflys later, use 'Save' instead.

settings.name: Settings
settings.desc: Edit settings and properties related to this document and the app.

draw_vertices.name: Draw vertices
draw_vertices.desc: Add new vertices to this polygon.

settings.desc: Click anywhere on the map to add the next vertex of your polygon. When you are done, click on the first vertex to close it, or simply deselect the draw tool and it will close automatically.

snap.name: Snap to nearby features
snap.desc: When enabled, the cursor will automatically snap to nearby features such as vertices or points, making it easy to draw the same line in different features.

show_verts.name: Show vertices
show_verts.desc: Whether to show a marker on each vertex of the polygon.

snap_distance.name: Snap distance
snap_distance.desc: The distance, in pixels, under which the cursor will snap to nearby features.

pencil_step.name: Pencil step
pencil_step.desc: The distance, in pixels, between vertices laid out while right-clicking.

vertex_size.name: Vertex size
vertex_size.desc: The size of the vertices on the map (visual only).

move_vertices.name: Move vertices
move_vertices.desc: Move the vertices that make up this polygon, and add new vertices between them.

cut.desc: Draw a new shape that will be cut from this one.

delete_vertices.name: Delete vertices
delete_vertices.desc: Remove individual vertices, or entire sections of the shape.

settings.desc: Select one of the two delete modes to choose how to delete vertices.

individual.name: Individual
individual.desc: Click on individual vertices to remove them.

section.name: Section
section.desc: Select two vertices. This will form a path between the two. Then, use the 'Delete vertices' button to delete all vertices in the path, excluding both ends.

union.name: Polygon union
union.desc: Choose other polygons to add their area to this one.

settings.desc: Select a polygon from the list below and click on 'Join'. Alternative, just hold down Ctrl and click on other polygons on the map to add them to this one.

delete_target.label: Delete polygons added to this one.

difference.name: Polygon subtraction
difference.desc: Choose other polygons to remove their area from this one.

intersect.name: Polygon intersection
intersect.desc: Choose another polygon to remove all area in this polygon that isn't shared with the one chosen.

set_origin.name: Set first vertex
set_origin.desc: Choose which vertex becomes the first vertex of the shape.

move_shape.name: Move polygon
move_shape.desc: Move the polygon itself around the map.
